briefs.title: Council to Consider Renewing North Road BIA for 2026
briefs.summary: Burnaby City Council is set to vote on a Certificate of Sufficiency for the North Road Business Improvement Area (BIA) — a formal confirmation that enough local businesses support renewing the BIA for 2026. If approved, businesses in the North Road area would continue to pay a levy (a small extra fee on top of regular taxes) that funds local promotions and improvements.
briefs.action_required: Check if your business is in the North Road BIA zone — this levy could affect your 2026 costs.

key_dates.label: North Road BIA Certificate of Sufficiency — Burnaby Council vote
